---
title: "Lecture 1: Introduction to Bobology"
date: "2026-05-09"
order: 1
description: "Slide-deck companion to Lesson 1: a field guide to Bobbles, Ekos, Vessels, and Daemons, and the role each plays at the decision gate. Also available as a [long-form lecture](/introduction-to-bobology.html)."
categories: [presentation, bobble, bobology]
path: /assets/introduction-to-bobology.pdf
---

```{=html}
<p>Opening <a href="/assets/introduction-to-bobology.pdf">the slide deck (PDF)</a>… or switch to the <a href="/introduction-to-bobology.html">long-form lecture</a>.</p>
<script>window.location.replace("/assets/introduction-to-bobology.pdf");</script>
```
